case_title: J. W. LEASING vs. MARK, BEAUTY et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF J. W. LEASING AS TO DEFENDANT MARK, BEAUTY ZEIDLER, ALFRED BROWN, GORDON DUNNE, CHERYL DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-15-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-16-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-27-1994
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-15-1994, CONTINUED TO OCT-13-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT. SANCTIONS OF $150.00 IMPOSED BUT STAYED UNTIL 10/13/94. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-13-1994, CONTINUED TO OCT-13-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR STATUS OF PAYMENTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-13-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $150.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-13-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), STAY ON $150.00 SANCTIONS IS LIFTED DUE TO PLAINTIFF'S NOT TAKING ANY ACTION ON CASE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-14-1995 CONTINUED FROM OCT-13-1995 TO NOV-14-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-14-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE AS TO WHY NO REPORT TO COURT OF SETTLEMENT OR AGREEMENT. SANCTIONS OF $150 VACATED. HEARING SET FOR JAN-17-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION OF FRANK R. CHASE IN SUPPORT OF CONTINUANCE OF STATUS CONFERENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF J. W. LEASING
